abstract: One-time setup skill for any ASOME project. Discovers the GitHub Project linked to the current repo, fetches all field and option IDs via GraphQL, and writes .asome/config.json. All other ASOME skills read from this config instead of hardcoding project-specific IDs. The config is committed to git (not gitignored) — it holds no secrets, only project-public GraphQL node IDs and branch names, so the whole team shares one source of truth without re-running setup.
